title: design_artifact
description: Artifact produced by the draft room: the proposal written to disk (filling the matching template kind) plus a checkpoint summary and a self-assessed completeness signal.

kind.description: The template kind chosen for this proposal (docs/proposals/templates/).

summary_markdown.description: Checkpoint view the operator reads: the proposal body, or a digest if the full doc is large. Markdown.

file_path.description: Path (relative to working_dir) the proposal markdown was written to (005-proposal.md), or the amended existing proposal.

confidence.description: Author's own estimate that the proposal is solid given the inputs.

needs_clarification.description: True when the author judges more operator input is required before the proposal is solid.

follow_up_questions.description: Questions to route back into a brief revision when needs_clarification is true. Empty otherwise.

sections.description: Optional outline of the proposal's top-level sections.
